findings.title: Review wave is stale after post-snapshot repair changes
findings.rationale: The parent review evidence snapshot for bundle 62f20f7b was captured at 2026-04-17T23:45:37Z, but the reviewed runtime and proof receipt were changed afterward to add stale mission-close repair routing. Parent record-review-outcome validates the original review_truth_snapshot against current mission truth, so this wave cannot be honestly cleared clean from the captured bundle; attempting clean writeback would either fail the truth guard or omit the latest repair from the frozen evidence.
findings.suggested_next_action: Have the parent/orchestrator record this wave as blocked or contaminated, then compile a fresh review bundle after the latest runtime and receipt changes and rerun the required code/correctness and spec/intent reviewer lanes.
